learn.core_idea: TLBs cache recent translations, reducing repeated page-table work for locality-heavy access patterns.
mechanism_steps: Miss falls back to page table and installs entry.
Subsequent local references tend to hit.
learn.worked_example: Alternating references between two hot pages quickly converges to TLB hits.
common_mistakes: Confusing page fault with TLB miss.
Reading only total faults, not locality behavior.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can explain hit vs miss path.
I can relate access order to hit potential.
I can verify miss reduction goal.
